hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *stocktrim_public_api_client/generated/*|*stocktrim_public_api_client/client_types.py) echo '⚠️  WARNING: You edited a GENERATED file. This change will be LOST on next `uv run poe regenerate-client`. Add the fix to scripts/regenerate_client.py (e.g., NULLABLE_FIELDS) instead. See /add-nullable-field skill.' ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) case "$f" in *stocktrim_public_api_client/generated/*) ;; *) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10; uv run ruff format --quiet "$f" 2>&1 | tail -5 ;; esac ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) case "$f" in *stocktrim_public_api_client/generated/*) ;; *) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ty check 2>&1 | tail -15 ;; esac ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */tests/test_*.py|*/tests/*/test_*.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run pytest "$f" -x --timeout=30 -q 2>&1 | tail -25 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */stocktrim-openapi.yaml) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run poe validate-openapi 2>&1 | tail -15 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */scripts/regenerate_client.py) echo '💡 scripts/regenerate_client.py changed — run `uv run poe regenerate-client` to apply changes to generated/. Do NOT manually edit files in generated/.' ;; esac

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && changed=$( { git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null; git log --diff-filter=ACMR --name-only --pretty=format: --since='4 hours ago' 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$changed" -gt 3 ]; then echo "💡 Session touched $changed files — consider /harness-kit:harness retro to capture learnings, and /quality-gate before declaring done."; fi
